---
title: "Class 5 Exercises"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "14 Jan 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

## function of summation
```{r}
sumof2num <- function(x,y){
    x+y
}

sumof2num(2,3)
```


## function of arithmetic operations (simple calculations)
```{r}
arithOp <- function(x, y, operation){
  if (operation == "add" || operation == "+"){
    return(x + y) 
  }
  else if (operation == "subtract" || operation == "-"){
    return(x - y)
  }
  else if (operation == "divide" || operation == "/"){
    return(x / y)
  }
  else if (operation == "multiply" || operation == "*"){
    return(x * y)
  }
  else{
    stop("Invalid operation: Use add, +, subtract, -, divide, /, multiply, *")
  }
}
```
```{r}
arithOp(2,5,"+")
arithOp(3,6,"*")
arithOp(9,3,"-")
arithOp(14,2,"/")
arithOp(3,8,"subtract")
arithOp(7,5,"divide")
        
```

## Marks To Grade

1. Absolute Grading
```{r}
abs_marks_to_grade <- function(marks){
  if (marks >= 95){
    grade <- "O"
    gp <- 10
  }
  else if (marks >= 90){
    grade <- "A"
    gp <- 10
  }
  else if (marks >= 80){
    grade <- "B+"
    gp <- 9
  }
  else if (marks >= 70){
    grade <- "B"
    gp <- 8
  }
  else if (marks >= 60){
    grade <- "C+"
    gp <- 7
  }
  else if (marks >= 50){
    grade <- "C"
    gp <- 6
  }
  else if (marks >= 40){
    grade <- "D+"
    gp <- 5
  }
  else if (marks >= 30){
    grade <- "D"
    gp <- 4
  }
  else if (marks < 30){
    grade <- "F"
    gp <- 0
  }
  
  cat("\n")
  return(c(Grade = grade, Point = gp))
}
```

```{r}
abs_marks_to_grade(50)
abs_marks_to_grade(95)
```
```{r}
g <- rnorm(n = 200, mean = 82, sd = 10)
g[g > 100] <- 100
g[g < 1] <- 1

abs_result <- t(sapply(g, abs_marks_to_grade))

abs_df <- data.frame(
  Marks = g,
  Grade = abs_result[, "Grade"],
  GradePoint = as.numeric(abs_result[, "Point"])
)

abs_df

```

2. Relative Grading

```{r}
rel_marks_to_grade <- function(marks, class_marks) {
  
  m <- mean(class_marks)
  s <- sd(class_marks)
  
  divs <- c(-Inf,
            m - 2.5*s,
            m - 2*s,
            m - 1*s,
            m - 0.5*s,
            m,
            m + 0.5*s,
            m + 1*s,
            m + 1.5*s,
            Inf)
  
  grades <- cut(marks,
                breaks = divs,
                labels = c("F","D","D+","C","C+","B","B+","A","O"),
                right = FALSE)
  
  gp <- c(F=0, D=4, `D+`=5, C=6, `C+`=7, B=8, `B+`=9, A=10, O=10)
  
  data.frame(
    Marks = marks,
    Grade = grades,
    GradePoint = gp[as.character(grades)]
  )
}
```

```{r}
class_marks <- c(42, 55, 60, 63, 68, 72, 75, 78, 82, 85, 88, 90, 94, 97)

mean(class_marks)
sd(class_marks)
```

```{r}
g <- c(35, 48, 52, 67, 74, 81, 89, 91, 95, 60,
       72, 85, 77, 69, 58, 44, 39, 99, 100, 83)


rel_df <- rel_marks_to_grade(g, g)

rel_df

table(result$Grade)
boxplot(g)

```




```{r}
rel_marks_to_grade(97, class_marks)
rel_marks_to_grade(83, class_marks)
rel_marks_to_grade(50, class_marks)
rel_marks_to_grade(30, class_marks)
```
